name: Candy Shop Cookie Pizza (Crisp) Corrected Version
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F. Lightly grease a 12-inch pizza pan or 15x10x1 inch baking pan.
In a small bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt. Set aside.
In a large mixing bowl, beat butter until creamy. Gradually add sugars, beating until smooth. Beat in egg and vanilla.
Gradually add the flour mixture to the butter mixture, stirring until combined. Stir in chocolate morsels.
Using buttered wax paper, spread the dough in the prepared pan. Bake 20-30 minutes or until lightly browned. Leave in the pizza pan.
Immediately sprinkle remaining one cup of morsels over the crust. Let stand five minutes or until morsels become soft and shiny.
Gently spread chocolate evenly over the crust. Let set (after cooling, the pizza may need to be refrigerated for 30 minutes for the chocolate to set).
Optional: If desired, when the cookie comes out of the oven, sprinkle one cup of morsels on the hot crust. Drop peanut butter by spoonfuls on top of the morsels. Let stand five minutes or until morsels become soft and shiny.
Gently spread peanut butter evenly over the chocolate. Quickly sprinkle the pizza with chopped candy (after cooling, the pizza may need to be refrigerated for 30 minutes for toppings to set).
